subcodes.first_line: This is the day whereon all names and all things cry out with the most exalted call, and the servants and [3.5s]... ...We beseech God to aid all the leaves to attain the knowledge of the Tree and deprive them not of the ocean of His generosity. In this day no regard is paid to loftiness or lowliness
subcodes.first_line_orig: امروز روزیست که جمیع اسما و جمیع اشیاء باعلی الندآء ذکر مینمایند و عباد و
subcodes.subjects: @acknowledgment of gift; of monetary contribution, @spiritual transformation, @status of material wealth; wealth and poverty
